title: Tick 11: mark C6 blocked because AI Gateway does not fit the MCP server contract and record C7 Radar baseline for opensubagents org
question: Does C6 as written fit Cloudflare AI Gateway's actual contract and does the Cloudflare Radar MCP return a usable baseline rank for opensubagents org and subagentmcp com that a future tick can diff against?
success_criteria: C6 row flipped to blocked with a runroc that cites Cloudflare documentation showing AI Gateway proxies LLM provider endpoints not arbitrary HTTP MCP servers and lists alternatives the operator can choose from
C7 row flipped to done with a Radar baseline that records the rank and bucket for opensubagents org and subagentmcp com on the Radar reference date
runrocs outcomes runrocs C6-gateway json and outcomes runrocs C7-radar json capture the docs evidence the queries the responses and the interpretation

capabilities: Cloudflare AI Gateway contract verified against the docs as LLM-provider-only and recorded as a misfit for the deterministic outcomes-mcp worker
Radar baseline captured for opensubagents org with bucket greater than 200000
Radar baseline captured for subagentmcp com with rank null and bucket null which is the Radar response when there is insufficient sample data
